backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing user profiles, health assessments with scoring/recommendations, and admin dashboard statistics with role-based access control using MixinAuthorization.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting four high-confidence features related to fixing the Complete Assessment button, backend submission, navigation to results, and admin dashboard verification.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of frontend components including routing, assessment flow, UI components, hooks, and data structures for the ABL Pulse wellness assessment application.
frontend/index.css: Global stylesheet with Tailwind directives, OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light/dark themes, and design tokens for colors, spacing, and UI elements.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for ABL Pulse application with meta tags, title, and root div mounting the React app via main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component configuring TanStack Router with routes for home, assessment sections, results, admin dashboard, and wrapping everything in AssessmentProvider context.
frontend/src/components/AboutSection.tsx: About section displaying Root Cause Healing philosophy, four core value cards with icons and hover effects, and integrated founder profile component.
frontend/src/components/admin/AccessDeni: Full-screen access denied page with bilingual messaging and a button to return home, shown when unauthorized users attempt to access admin areas.
frontend/src/components/admin/Assessment: Filter panel for admin assessment table with search by name, date range pickers, score range inputs, and a clear filters button showing active filter count.
frontend/src/components/admin/QuickStats: Dashboard component displaying four key statistics (total assessments, average score, alert users, recent submissions) using StatCard components with loading skeletons.
frontend/src/components/admin/StatCard.t: Reusable card component for displaying a single statistic with an icon, title, value, optional subtitle, and variant styling (default/success/warning/danger).
frontend/src/components/admin/TablePagin: Pagination controls for data tables with page size selector, previous/next buttons, and display of current range and total items.
frontend/src/components/admin/UserAssess: Admin table component for displaying user assessment data with filtering (search, date range, score range), sorting, pagination, and CSV export functionality.
frontend/src/components/AnalysisCard.tsx: Reusable card component displaying bilingual analysis results with conditional styling for problems (red) or suggestions (green) and formatted item lists.
frontend/src/components/AssessmentPlaceh: Empty placeholder component file with no content.
frontend/src/components/AssessmentProgre: Progress bar component showing current section number (1-4) and visual percentage completion with animated gradient fill.
frontend/src/components/BasicInfoForm.ts: Form component for collecting user's basic information (name, age, gender, profession, physical metrics, contact details, and medical history) before starting the health assessment. Validates inputs, stores data locally, and navigates to the first assessment section on submission.
frontend/src/components/CircularScoreGau: Circular progress gauge component that displays a health score with color-coded gradients (red for alert, amber for needs work, green for optimal) using SVG circles and animated stroke offsets.
frontend/src/components/ContactFooter.ts: Footer component with brand information, quick navigation links, WhatsApp consultation button, social media icons (Facebook, Instagram, YouTube, LinkedIn), and copyright information.
frontend/src/components/ErrorBoundary.ts: React error boundary component that catches and displays errors with bilingual messaging (English/Hindi), offering options to retry or reload the page.
frontend/src/components/FounderProfile.t: Profile card component displaying Dr. Suman Lal's image, credentials (40+ years experience), and mission statement for 'Ayurved Banaye Life'.
frontend/src/components/GlobalAssessment: Reusable component rendering five frequency options (Never, Rarely, Sometimes, Often, Daily) in both English and Hindi for assessment questions.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Landing page hero section with animated background effects, main headline 'Small Habits. Big Impact.', and CTAs for free health assessment and WhatsApp consultation booking.
frontend/src/components/LanguageSelectio: Empty file placeholder for language selection component.
frontend/src/components/LanguageToggleBu: Empty file placeholder for language toggle button component.
frontend/src/components/LoadingScreen.ts: Full-screen loading component displaying the ABL Pulse logo with pulse animation and bilingual loading text.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Main navigation component with desktop/mobile layouts, logo display, navigation items (Home, Assessment, About, Contact), language toggle for assessment sections, and smooth scrolling functionality.
frontend/src/components/QuestionCard.tsx: Empty file placeholder for question card component.
frontend/src/components/QuestionCard40.t: Empty file placeholder for specialized question card component.
frontend/src/components/ResultsPage.tsx: Empty file placeholder for assessment results page component.
frontend/src/components/ResumeProgressMo: Empty file placeholder for modal component to resume incomplete assessments.
frontend/src/components/SectionContainer: Empty file placeholder for assessment section container component.
frontend/src/components/SectionScoreCard: Displays a health assessment section score card with bilingual labels (English/Hindi), status indicators (alert/needsWork/optimal), and a visual progress bar showing score out of 40.
frontend/src/components/ServicesGrid.tsx: Renders a grid of four service cards (Health Score Card, Webinars, 1-on-1 Support, Structured Programs) with icons, titles, and descriptions for the landing page.
frontend/src/components/TipCard.tsx: An expandable card component displaying health tips in both English and Hindi with an accordion to reveal detailed explanations of why the tip is beneficial.
frontend/src/config/constants.ts: Application-wide constants including WhatsApp configuration, app metadata, and score thresholds for section and total assessment scoring.
React context providing assessment state management including responses (40 questions), current section, language (en/hi), and section completion/access logic with localStorage persistence.
frontend/src/data/questions/en.ts: English language questions for a 12-question assessment covering sleep, hydration, nutrition, exercise, and mental well-being across 4 sections.
frontend/src/data/questions/hi.ts: Hindi language translations of the 12-question assessment covering sleep, hydration, nutrition, exercise, and mental well-being across 4 sections.
frontend/src/data/sections/section1.ts: Section 1 questions (IDs 1-10) in English and Hindi focusing on daily routines including wake time, water intake, sunlight, chewing habits, screen time, and sleep patterns.
frontend/src/data/sections/section2.ts: Section 2 questions (IDs 11-20) in English and Hindi focusing on diet and digestion including herbal drinks, seeds, fasting windows, ghee, sugar avoidance, and meal timing.
frontend/src/data/sections/section3.ts: Section 3 questions (IDs 21-30) in English and Hindi focusing on physical activity including walking, stretching, step count, breathing exercises, and strength training.
frontend/src/data/sections/section4.ts: Section 4 questions (IDs 31-40) in English and Hindi focusing on mental well-being including gratitude, positivity, family time, emotional stability, and professional guidance.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook for managing Internet Computer backend actor with authentication, creating authenticated or anonymous actors based on identity, and invalidating dependent queries on actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useBasicInfoStorage.t: Custom hook for managing basic user info (name, age, gender, profession, weight, height, WhatsApp) in localStorage with save, retrieve, clear, and validation functions.
frontend/src/hooks/useDebounce.ts: Custom React hook that debounces a value by a specified delay using setTimeout and cleanup in useEffect.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity authentication context and hooks for ICP, managing login/logout state, identity persistence, and AuthClient lifecycle with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/usePagination.ts: Generic pagination hook that manages page state, calculates total pages, slices data, and provides navigation functions (next/previous/goToPage) with dynamic page size support.
frontend/src/hooks/usePDFDownload.ts: Custom hook that manages PDF generation state and downloads wellness assessment reports using the pdfGenerator utility with toast notifications.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: React Query hooks for assessment data: useSubmitAssessment mutation to save assessments, useGetAllAssessments and useAdminAssessments queries to fetch and transform assessment data for admin dashboard.
frontend/src/hooks/useTableSort.ts: Generic table sorting hook that manages sort column and direction state, provides toggle handler, and returns a comparator function for sorting data.
frontend/src/index.css: Global styles with Tailwind setup, OKLCH color system for brand/semantic colors, custom animations (pulse-glow, electric-wave-flow), and font definitions (Playfair Display, Montserrat).
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the root component with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboardPage.ts: Admin dashboard page displaying quick stats cards and user assessment data table with navigation, loading states, and error handling.
frontend/src/pages/AdminLoginPage.tsx: Empty file placeholder for admin login page implementation.
frontend/src/pages/AssessmentPage.tsx: Assessment form page with logo, back navigation, and BasicInfoForm component rendered in a centered layout.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Main landing page composing Navigation, HeroSection, ServicesGrid, AboutSection, and ContactFooter components.
frontend/src/pages/LogicCorrectionDocsPa: Documentation page that displays a bilingual (English/Hindi) template format for submitting logic corrections and feature updates. Includes accordion sections, cards, and code examples for structured communication with the development team.
frontend/src/pages/RecommendedServicesPa: Displays recommended wellness services (webinars, coaching, functional readiness) based on user assessment scores. Shows user info card with total score and status, and renders three static service cards with action buttons.
frontend/src/pages/ResultsPage.tsx: Shows final assessment results with total score, section breakdowns, circular gauge, analysis cards, and action buttons for PDF download and WhatsApp consultation. Validates completion before rendering and redirects if incomplete.
frontend/src/pages/Section1.tsx: Assessment page for Section 1 (Sleep & Hydration) with 10 questions, bilingual titles, progress bar, and navigation. Validates section completion before allowing navigation to Section 2.
frontend/src/pages/Section2.tsx: Assessment page for Section 2 (Gut Cleanse & Metabolic) with access guard that redirects if Section 1 is incomplete. Displays questions with bilingual UI and navigation controls.
frontend/src/pages/Section3.tsx: Assessment page for Section 3 (Movement & Circulation Flow) with cascading access guards that redirect to first incomplete section. Includes bilingual questions and standard assessment navigation.
frontend/src/pages/Section4.tsx: Renders the fourth assessment section (Mind & Emotional), validates completion of all 40 questions across all sections, calculates scores and analysis, then submits the full assessment to the backend.
frontend/src/pages/TestModePage.tsx: Displays three test profiles (Healthy, Moderate, Serious) fetched from the backend with their scores, medical history, and analysis results in a tabbed interface for testing purposes.
frontend/src/pages/WellnessProfilePage.t: Displays the user's wellness profile after assessment completion, showing basic info, total ABL score, and individual section scores with color-coded status indicators.
frontend/src/types/admin.ts: Defines TypeScript types for admin dashboard data structures including assessment rows, filters, sorting, and pagination state.
frontend/src/types/assessment.ts: Defines core TypeScript types for the assessment including language, basic info form data, questions, and sections.
Empty file intended for admin statistics calculation utilities.
frontend/src/utils/csvExport.ts: Provides utilities to format assessment data as CSV, escape fields properly, generate CSV strings, and trigger browser downloads.
frontend/src/utils/patternAnalysis.ts: Implements rule-based pattern analysis to identify low-scoring question groups and map them to specific health problems with Ayurvedic habit suggestions in English and Hindi.
frontend/src/utils/pdfGenerator.ts: Generates a formatted text-based wellness report with scores, section breakdown, problems, and suggestions, then triggers a browser download as a .txt file.
frontend/src/utils/resultsSharingUtils.t: Empty file intended for results sharing utilities.
frontend/src/utils/scoringUtils.ts: Calculates assessment scores from 40 questions divided into 4 sections (10 questions each, max 40 points per section), categorizes scores into alert/needsWork/optimal ranges, and provides styling utilities for score categories.
frontend/src/utils/testDataProcessor.ts: Converts backend SectionScores into frontend display format by generating realistic question-level responses from section totals, running pattern analysis, and creating section data with status indicators and medical history-based recommendations.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utilities for extracting URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, managing sessionStorage persistence for parameters like admin tokens, and cleaning sensitive parameters from URLs without page reload.
frontend/src/utils/whatsappIntegration.t: Opens WhatsApp consultation with a pre-filled message containing user name and ABL score, directing to the default consultation number configured in constants.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom color scheme using OKLCH color space, brand colors, typography with Playfair Display and Montserrat fonts, custom animations, and plugins for typography and container queries.
project_state.json: Project state tracking document indicating this is a fix request for the Complete Assessment button not responding to clicks, with requirements to fix submission, backend integration, navigation to wellness report, and admin dashboard verification.
